summary: Three localization string bugs found across home_patrol_test (2 bugs: wrong case for 'Mi garaje' and 'Ver todas') and profile_patrol_test (1 bug: wrong error message string). Tests pass because OR-assertions have valid fallback branches, but the broken branches silently reduce coverage. One-line fixes required in two files.

qualityGates.notes: All three tests guard permission dialogs at 4 points: splash, login load, post-login, post-tab-navigation
TextField, tab icons, and AppBar title are all waited before interaction or assertion

profile_patrol_test has a strong hard assertion on 'Mi perfil'. events_patrol_test OR-assertion includes tab label which is trivially true. home_patrol_test OR-assertion has two branches that will never match due to string case bugs.
All tests structurally handle both states. Error-state branch in profile_patrol_test uses wrong string. Empty-state soft checks in home_patrol_test use wrong case.

bugs.reason: profile_loadingError ARB value does not match hardcoded string

qualityGates.notes: No unused imports in any test file
String.fromEnvironment used for TEST_EMAIL and TEST_PASSWORD in all files
